mapper.select:
/** UsptExpertDao.selectListByExtrc */ select c.expert_id , c.expert_nm , c.gender_cd , c.native as native_yn , c.enc_brthdy , c.enc_mbtlnum , c.enc_email , c.wrc_nm , c.dept_nm , c.ofcps_nm , c.dty_nm , c.wrc_adres , c.wrc_adres_detail , c.wrc_adres_zip , c.wrc_telno , c.last_univ_nm , c.univ_dept_nm , c.act_realm_cd , c.attachment_group_id , c.expert_reqst_process_sttus_cd , ( select bb.expert_cl_nm from uspt_expert_cl_mapng aa inner join uspt_expert_cl bb on aa.expert_cl_id = bb.expert_cl_id where aa.expert_id = b.expert_id and bb.expert_cl_id in (array_to_string(a.expert_cl_id,',')) ) || ' > ' || c.ofcps_nm as expert_cl_nm /*전문가분야*/ , b.lsn_result_cd , COALESCE(fn_cmm_get_code_nm('LSN_RESULT', b.lsn_result_cd),'대기중') as lsn_result_nm , row_number() over (order by b.created_dt desc) as rn , a.odr_no || '차 추출' as odr_nm , b.extrc_mfcmm_id /*추출위원id*/ from uspt_evl_mfcmm_extrc a /*평가위원추출조건정보*/ inner join uspt_extrc_mfcmm b /*추출위원*/ on a.mfcmm_extrc_id = b.mfcmm_extrc_id inner join uspt_expert c /*전문가정보*/ on b.expert_id = c.expert_id where a.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId} and a.odr_no = #{odrNo}
and b.lsn_result_cd = #{lsnResultCd}

/** UsptExpertDao.selectMfcmmDetail */ select b.expert_id , b.expert_nm , b.gender_cd , b.native as native_yn , b.enc_brthdy , b.enc_mbtlnum , b.enc_email , b.wrc_nm , b.dept_nm , b.ofcps_nm , b.dty_nm , b.wrc_adres , b.wrc_adres_detail , b.wrc_adres_zip , b.wrc_telno , b.last_univ_nm , b.univ_dept_nm , b.act_realm_cd , b.attachment_group_id , b.expert_reqst_process_sttus_cd , a.extrc_mfcmm_id /*추출위원id*/ from uspt_extrc_mfcmm a /*추출위원*/ inner join uspt_expert b /*전문가정보*/ on a.expert_id = b.expert_id where a.extrc_mfcmm_id = #{extrcMfcmmId}

/** UsptExpertDao.selectListByExcl */ select c.expert_id , c.expert_nm , c.gender_cd , c.native as native_yn , c.enc_brthdy , c.enc_mbtlnum , c.enc_email , c.wrc_nm , c.dept_nm , c.ofcps_nm , c.dty_nm , c.wrc_adres , c.wrc_adres_detail , c.wrc_adres_zip , c.wrc_telno , c.last_univ_nm , c.univ_dept_nm , c.act_realm_cd , c.attachment_group_id , c.expert_reqst_process_sttus_cd , b.excl_resn_cn , ( select bb.expert_cl_nm from uspt_expert_cl_mapng aa inner join uspt_expert_cl bb on aa.expert_cl_id = bb.expert_cl_id where aa.expert_id = b.expert_id and bb.expert_cl_id in (array_to_string(a.expert_cl_id,',')) ) || ' > ' || c.ofcps_nm as expert_cl_nm /*전문가분야*/ , row_number() over (order by b.created_dt desc) as rn , a.odr_no || '차 추출' as odr_nm from uspt_evl_mfcmm_extrc a /*평가위원추출조건정보*/ inner join uspt_excl_mfcmm b /*제외위원*/ on a.mfcmm_extrc_id = b.mfcmm_extrc_id inner join uspt_expert c /*전문가정보*/ on b.expert_id = c.expert_id where a.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId} and a.odr_no = #{odrNo}

/** UsptExpertDao.getExpertReqstList */ select expert_id , expert_nm , gender_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('GENDER', gender_cd) as gender_nm , native as native_yn , case when coalesce(native, false) = true then '내국인' else '외국인' end as native_nm , enc_brthdy , enc_mbtlnum , enc_email , wrc_nm , dept_nm , ofcps_nm , dty_nm , wrc_adres , wrc_adres_detail , wrc_adres_zip , wrc_telno , last_univ_nm , univ_dept_nm , act_realm_cd , attachment_group_id , expert_reqst_process_sttus_cd , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('RCEPT_STTUS',expert_reqst_process_sttus_cd) as expert_reqst_process_sttus_nm /** 전문가신청처리상태명**/ , to_char(created_dt ,'YYYY-MM-DD') as reg_dt /** 생성일시**/ from uspt_expert where expert_id = #{expertId}

/** UsptExpertDao.selectExpertMatchHistListCnt */ select count(1) as cnt from ( select ex.reg_dt /*매칭일*/ , bsns.bsns_year /*사업연도*/ , bsns.bsns_nm /*사업명*/ , bsns.pblanc_id /*공고ID*/ , bsns.pblanc_nm /*공고명*/ , bsns.pblanc_no /*공고번호*/ , ex.act_realm /*활동분양*/ , ex.sect_id /*분과ID*/ , evl.rcept_odr /*접수차수*/ from ( select a.evl_cmit_id /*평가위원회ID*/ , a.sect_id /*분과ID*/ , to_char(b.created_dt,'yyyymmdd') as reg_dt /*매칭일*/ , '평가위원' as act_realm /*활동분양*/ from uspt_evl_cmit a /*평가위원회*/ inner join uspt_evl_mfcmm b /*평가위원*/ on a.evl_cmit_id = b.evl_cmit_id and a.evl_sttus_cd = 'EVST03' /*평가완료*/ inner join uspt_expert c /*전문가*/ on b.expert_id = c.expert_id and c.expert_id=#{expertId} ) ex inner join ( select a.pblanc_id /*공고ID*/ , a.evl_plan_id /*평가계획ID*/ , a.evl_sttus_cd /*평가진행상태코드(G:EVL_STTUS)*/ , a.rcept_odr /*접수차수*/ , b.sect_id /*분과ID*/ from uspt_evl_plan a /*평가계획*/ inner join uspt_sect b /*분과정보*/ on a.evl_plan_id = b.evl_plan_id and a.evl_sttus_cd = 'EVST03' /*평가완료*/ ) evl on ex.sect_id = evl.sect_id inner join ( select a.bsns_cd /*사업코드*/ , a.bsns_year /*사업연도*/ , a.bsns_nm /*사업명*/ , b.pblanc_id /*공고ID*/ , b.pblanc_nm /*공고명*/ , b.pblanc_no /*공고번호*/ from uspt_bsns a /*사업*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc b /*사업공고*/ on a.bsns_cd = b.bsns_cd ) bsns on evl.pblanc_id = bsns.pblanc_id group by ex.reg_dt /*매칭일*/ , bsns.bsns_year /*사업연도*/ , bsns.bsns_nm /*사업명*/ , bsns.pblanc_id /*공고ID*/ , bsns.pblanc_nm /*공고명*/ , bsns.pblanc_no /*공고번호*/ , ex.act_realm /*활동분양*/ , ex.sect_id /*분과ID*/ , evl.rcept_odr /*접수차수*/ ) totCnt

/** UsptExpertDao.selectExpertMatchHistList */ select ex.reg_dt /*매칭일*/ , bsns.bsns_year /*사업연도*/ , bsns.bsns_nm /*사업명*/ , bsns.pblanc_id /*공고ID*/ , bsns.pblanc_nm /*공고명*/ , bsns.pblanc_no /*공고번호*/ , ex.act_realm /*활동분양*/ , ex.sect_id /*분과ID*/ , evl.rcept_odr /*접수차수*/ , row_number() over (order by ex.reg_dt desc) as rn from ( select a.evl_cmit_id /*평가위원회ID*/ , a.sect_id /*분과ID*/ , to_char(b.created_dt,'yyyymmdd') as reg_dt /*매칭일*/ , '평가위원' as act_realm /*활동분양*/ from uspt_evl_cmit a /*평가위원회*/ inner join uspt_evl_mfcmm b /*평가위원*/ on a.evl_cmit_id = b.evl_cmit_id and a.evl_sttus_cd = 'EVST03' /*평가완료*/ inner join uspt_expert c /*전문가*/ on b.expert_id = c.expert_id and c.expert_id=#{expertId} ) ex inner join ( select a.pblanc_id /*공고ID*/ , a.evl_plan_id /*평가계획ID*/ , a.evl_sttus_cd /*평가진행상태코드(G:EVL_STTUS)*/ , a.rcept_odr /*접수차수*/ , b.sect_id /*분과ID*/ from uspt_evl_plan a /*평가계획*/ inner join uspt_sect b /*분과정보*/ on a.evl_plan_id = b.evl_plan_id and a.evl_sttus_cd = 'EVST03' /*평가완료*/ ) evl on ex.sect_id = evl.sect_id inner join ( select a.bsns_cd /*사업코드*/ , a.bsns_year /*사업연도*/ , a.bsns_nm /*사업명*/ , b.pblanc_id /*공고ID*/ , b.pblanc_nm /*공고명*/ , b.pblanc_no /*공고번호*/ from uspt_bsns a /*사업*/ inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc b /*사업공고*/ on a.bsns_cd = b.bsns_cd ) bsns on evl.pblanc_id = bsns.pblanc_id group by ex.reg_dt /*매칭일*/ , bsns.bsns_year /*사업연도*/ , bsns.bsns_nm /*사업명*/ , bsns.pblanc_id /*공고ID*/ , bsns.pblanc_nm /*공고명*/ , bsns.pblanc_no /*공고번호*/ , ex.act_realm /*활동분양*/ , ex.sect_id /*분과ID*/ , evl.rcept_odr /*접수차수*/
offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}
